title: Update all Kennenlerntermin links/buttons to correct Calendly URL

requirements.summary: Update all introductory appointment ('Kennenlerntermin') buttons, links, and Calendly widget initializations across all pages and components to use the URL: https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon
acceptanceCriteria: Every button or link labeled with terms related to the introductory/free appointment (e.g., 'Kennenlerntermin', 'Erstgespräch', 'Gratisgespräch', 'Termin buchen', 'Jetzt buchen', 'Book a call', etc.) opens or navigates to https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon
Calendly popup widgets (Calendly.initPopupWidget) triggered by these buttons use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon

Calendly inline widgets (Calendly.initInlineWidget or data-url attributes) on ContactPage, ZurichCouplesLandingPage, BaselCouplesLandingPage, and SwissOnlineCouplesLandingPage use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon
No other Calendly URLs remain hardcoded in the codebase for intro/booking CTAs
All pages compile without errors after the change

file_operations.description: Update any Calendly booking buttons or links in the hero section and feature cards to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. Replace all occurrences of old Calendly URLs with the new one.

Update the Calendly booking section (inline widget or CTA buttons) to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. If using Calendly.initInlineWidget, update the url parameter. If using buttons with Calendly.initPopupWidget, update the url parameter.
Update any 'Kennenlerntermin' or free intro call booking buttons/links to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. Replace all old Calendly URLs with the new one.

Update any booking CTA buttons or Calendly links in the hero section or content to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. Replace all old Calendly URLs with the new one.
Update any booking CTA buttons or Calendly links targeting men to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. Replace all old Calendly URLs with the new one.
Update the Calendly booking CTA button to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. If using Calendly.initPopupWidget, update the url parameter.
Update any booking or contact CTA buttons/links to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. Replace all old Calendly URLs with the new one.

Update the Calendly booking widget (inline widget initialization or CTA buttons) to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. If using Calendly.initInlineWidget, update the url parameter in the options object.

Update the Calendly booking widget (inline widget initialization or CTA buttons) to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. If using Calendly.initInlineWidget, update the url parameter in the options object.

Update the embedded Calendly booking widget (inline widget initialization) to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. If using Calendly.initInlineWidget, update the url parameter in the options object.

Update any booking CTA buttons in the header navigation (desktop or mobile) or footer to use the URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon. Replace all old Calendly URLs with the new one.

If this component contains Calendly widget initialization logic, update any hardcoded Calendly URLs to use https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon as the default or prop value. Ensure the component passes the correct URL to Calendly.initInlineWidget.
